code: import React,{createContext,useContext,useState,useEffect,useCallback}from'react';import{authAPI}from'../services/api';import{jsx as _jsx}from"react/jsx-runtime";const AuthContext=/*#__PURE__*/createContext(null);export const AuthProvider=_ref=>{let{children}=_ref;const[user,setUser]=useState(null);const[loading,setLoading]=useState(true);useEffect(()=>{const stored=localStorage.getItem('fundrise_user');const token=localStorage.getItem('fundrise_token');if(stored&&token){try{setUser(JSON.parse(stored));}catch{localStorage.removeItem('fundrise_user');localStorage.removeItem('fundrise_token');}}setLoading(false);},[]);const login=useCallback(async(email,password)=>{const res=await authAPI.login({email,password});const{token,...userData}=res.data.data;localStorage.setItem('fundrise_token',token);localStorage.setItem('fundrise_user',JSON.stringify(userData));setUser(userData);return userData;},[]);const register=useCallback(async data=>{const res=await authAPI.register(data);const{token,...userData}=res.data.data;localStorage.setItem('fundrise_token',token);localStorage.setItem('fundrise_user',JSON.stringify(userData));setUser(userData);return userData;},[]);const logout=useCallback(()=>{localStorage.removeItem('fundrise_token');localStorage.removeItem('fundrise_user');setUser(null);},[]);const updateUser=useCallback(updatedData=>{const merged={...user,...updatedData};localStorage.setItem('fundrise_user',JSON.stringify(merged));setUser(merged);},[user]);const isAdmin=(user===null||user===void 0?void 0:user.role)==='ADMIN';const isAuthenticated=!!user;return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(AuthContext.Provider,{value:{user,loading,login,register,logout,updateUser,isAdmin,isAuthenticated},children:children});};export const useAuth=()=>{const ctx=useContext(AuthContext);if(!ctx)throw new Error('useAuth must be used within AuthProvider');return ctx;};
